posting.sponsorName: JATC for Roofers and Waterproofers, Local Union #195
posting.locationSummary: Central, Finger Lakes, Mohawk Valley, and North Country regions of New York
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain applications in person at the JATC office in Liverpool during weekday hours, or by appointment. All applications must be received by April 30, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: JATC for Roofers and Waterproofers, Local Union #195, 7706 Maltlage Drive, Liverpool, NY
posting.applicationHours: Mondays through Fridays, 9:00 a.m. to 11:30 a.m. and 1:00 p.m. to 3:30 p.m., excluding legal holidays; or by appointment during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have completed 10th grade or have three verifiable years of experience as a Roofer.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass alcohol and drug tests after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship. Must provide valid photo identification for drug testing.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have completed 10th grade or have three verifiable years of experience as a Roofer.
Must have a physical exam, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must pass alcohol and drug tests, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must provide valid photo identification for drug testing.

Must sign an affidavit stating that they are physically able to perform the work of a Roofer, which may include repetitive heavy lifting; repetitive kneeling, squatting, and walking; climbing ladders and scaffolds; working at heights that require a safety harness; working in extreme temperatures and severe weather conditions; and working with respirators.
Must provide DD Form 214, Certificate of Release or Discharge from Active Duty, if applicable, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship program.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have completed 10th grade or have three years of roofer experience, and be able to pass a sponsor-paid physical and drug/alcohol tests after selection.
posting.contactName: JATC for Roofers and Waterproofers, Local Union #195
posting.contactSummary: For further information, contact the JATC for Roofers and Waterproofers, Local Union #195 at (315) 699-1388.
